description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular column structure with four vertical faces, each covered in vibrant, high-resolution graphics. The most prominent face features a striking image of a woman's face partially obscured by green palm leaves, with the bold white text 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' running vertically. The kiosk stands on a square wooden platform, suggesting a temporary or modular installation suitable for events or exhibitions. The surface appears to be made of printed fabric or vinyl stretched over a lightweight frame, likely aluminum, with a translucent top panel. There are no visible windows, doors, or interactive elements, emphasizing its function as a promotional or informational display. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on visual impact and branding.
description: A tall, rectangular promotional kiosk with bold graphics, a wooden base, and a modern, visually striking design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main graphic with 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' text and a woman's face, plus a person for scale.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the kiosk and the continuation of the graphic around the corner.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizes the kiosk's rectangular shape and the seamless wrap of the printed graphics.
description_view_3: Rear angled view shows the other side of the kiosk, maintaining the same graphic style and structure.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the structure, vertically oriented on the main face, with the text 'RESORT EXTRUSIONS' in bold white letters.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a translucent or light-diffusing panel, no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist promotional style with bold graphics and clean lines.
